text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book *Multi-armed Bandit Allocation Indices* by J. C. Gittins is a well-documented, real publication by John Wiley & Sons (1989). The automated checker's "author mismatch" flagging "P. Jones" appears to be a database error; all credible sources (Wiley, AbeBooks, Google Books, SIAM Review) confirm Gittins as the sole author of the 1989 first edition.
LINK: https://epubs.siam.org/doi/10.1137/1033039
